verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Ah, how sweet it is for brothers, To dwell together In unity, in prayer, By the Spirit that gathers. Ah how sweet it is, To dwell together. Ah how sweet it is, To dwell together. (x3)

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: How good and pleasant it is for Brothers to dwell together

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: How good it is, how good it is La La La La La La La La La La!
